changes.summary: Replaced the withdrawn synthetic candidate with pinned date-valid academic evidence, independent corroboration, and per-boundary georeferencing records.
Rebuilt on the production global-h3-v1 fabric with a real r1->r2 split migration (refine_h3 corridors and split_by_boundary along the five evidenced frontiers).
Full 22,000-province eu-like aggregation with pinned hard historical constraints and modern boundary influence disabled.
Typed sovereign/owner/controller, cores and claims for corridor and capital provinces.
Deterministic owner-derived C-grade hierarchy scaffolding for priority-region provinces.
Executed kilometre golden borders, capital containment, and negative-anachronism gates on the full build; review sheets generated for independent sign-off.

migrations: Provinces are membership-derived over fabric global-h3-v1-r2; v1 synthetic province-* identifiers have no successor mapping (the v1 candidate was withdrawn, not migrated).
